name: Mushroom Rice
steps: Heat pan with a small amount of rapeseed oil to fry mushroom until golden.
Add superior light soy to soak into mushrooms.
Wrap securely with cling film and steam at 100C for 20-25 minutes.
Stir, taste and check with senior member. Adjust with more dashi if needed.
Rewrap and steam for another 15-20 minutes.
